diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports Hono class, types for Env/Handler/Context/Client
+- Internal names noticed: Hono (re-exported from ./hono)
+- Imports or neighbors: imports Hono from ./hono, re-exports Context, types from ./context, ./types, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Module entry point that re-exports public Hono framework code and types.
+- Copy-safe detail: Single-file re-export module; no local implementation. Exports: Hono, type exports Env/ErrorHandler/Handler/Context and client types.
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env/ErrorHandler/Handler types, Context types, Request types, Schema types, ValidationTargets
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, H, OnHandlerInterface, ToSchema, Endpoint, IntersectNonAnyTypes, Input, TypedResponse, FetchEventLike
+- Imports or neighbors: no external imports; deeply interdependent with ./hono-base, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for Hono including environment, schema, client requests, and handler types.
+- Copy-safe detail: Type-only file with extensive generics; exports type aliases and interfaces. Key exports: HonoBase, H, Schema, Endpoint, ValidationTargets, TypedResponse.
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class construction, options (router, getPath, strict)
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase (extends), SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: imports HonoBase from ./hono-base, routers from ./router, types from ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono application class extending HonoBase with router configuration and constructor.
+- Copy-safe detail: Concrete class Hono extending HonoBase; wraps router initialization; exposes options and extends base functionality.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: app.get/post/put/delete, app.on, app.use, app.route, app.basePath, app.mount, app.onError, app.notFound, .fetch(), .request()
+- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, HonoBase class, router, getPath, methods (get/post/put/delete/options/patch/all), _basePath, #path, routes, COMPOSED_HANDLER, notFoundHandler, errorHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: imports compose from ./compose, Context from ./context, type imports from ./types and ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Base class for Hono app with route registration, middleware support, and request dispatching logic.
+- Copy-safe detail: Contains router abstraction, handler composition, path management, error handling, and method chaining for routes.
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, c.header(), c.status(), c.set(), c.get(), c.json(), c.text(), c.html(), c.redirect(), c.body(), c.notFound(), c.var, c.env, c.res, c.event, c.executionCtx
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, DefaultRenderer, Renderer, #var, #status, #executionCtx, #res, #notFoundHandler, #matchResult, #path, #preparedHeaders, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, TextRespond, JSONRespond, BodyRespond, NewResponse, Layout
+- Imports or neighbors: imports HonoRequest from ./request, types from ./types, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase from ./utils/html
+- Plain-English summary: Request context class managing response, request data, environment variables, and middleware state.
+- Copy-safe detail: Context class wraps raw request and request object; methods return typed responses with status codes and headers; uses private fields (#var, #res, etc.) for encapsulation.
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest utility
+- Internal names noticed: BodyCache, GET_MATCH_RESULT, param(), query(), queries(), header(), parseBody(), json(), text(), arrayBuffer(), bytes(), blob(), valid(), addValidatedData(), url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath, #validatedData, #matchResult, #getParamValue, #cachedBody, parseBody
+- Imports or neighbors: imports HTTPException from ./http-exception, types from ./types, body parsing from ./utils/body, URL utilities from ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request processing class extracting path parameters, query strings, headers, body data and validated fields.
+- Copy-safe detail: HonoRequest wraps native Request; caches parsed body types; decodes param values; proxies most methods to underlying raw Request.
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT (exported symbol)
+- Internal names noticed: none (single export)
+- Imports or neighbors: none (leaf file)
+- Plain-English summary: Single symbol export for identifying match result at runtime.
+- Copy-safe detail: Leaf module exports only one unique symbol constant GET_MATCH_RESULT.
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody, BodyData type, ParseBodyOptions
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues, jsonRegex, detectResponseType
+- Imports or neighbors: imports HonoRequest from ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses request body from form data or JSON based on Content-Type and options.
+- Copy-safe detail: Utility for multipart/form-data and application/x-www-form-urlencoded parsing; returns structured BodyData type.
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch, compose, index, isError, handler
+- Imports or neighbors: imports Context from ./context, types Env/ErrorHandler/Next/NotFoundHandler from ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition function using koa-compose pattern; calls handlers in sequence with error and not-found handling.
+- Copy-safe detail: Returns wrapper function accepting [[Function, unknown], unknown][] array; dispatches middleware index; handles errors via onError and non-found via onNotFound.
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class, getResponse() method
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: imports ContentfulStatusCode from ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP status exception class with optional response and custom message.
+- Copy-safe detail: Extends Error with readonly status and optional res; getResponse() creates
